query:
SELECT a.id, a.status, a.completedAt, a.overallScore, a.riskLevel, f.name as facilityName, a.createdAt, a.updatedAt
FROM audits a
JOIN facilities f ON a.facilityId = f.id
ORDER BY a.updatedAt DESC
LIMIT 10;
